use_cases: Used for hydration, electrolyte replenishment, and supporting active or low-carb lifestyles.
adjectives: zero-sugar, science-backed, clean, flavorful, dietary-friendly
visual_design_notes: Packaging uses bold, block colors with minimalist fonts and a modern aesthetic; emphasizes 'no sugar' clearly.
product_traits: High sodium content, no added sugar or artificial ingredients, multiple flavors, keto/paleo/vegan friendly.
why_in_or_out: IN: Strong fit in hydration/electrolyte mix category, but currently no protein-based offerings to match a functional protein drink positioning.

use_cases: Pre/post workout energy, focus enhancement, dietary supplement, hydration support.
adjectives: functional, sugar-free, carbonated, flavorful, energizing, low-calorie, vitamin-enriched
visual_design_notes: Bright, colorful cans with bold branding and clean, modern typography.
product_traits: BCAA-fortified, vitamin-enriched, sugar-free, low-calorie, caffeine options, various flavors, carbonated.
why_in_or_out: Included as a leading international BCAA and energy drink brand relevant to fitness and functional beverage categories.

use_cases: Consumed as a post-workout beverage, party drink, or social occasion refreshment for fitness enthusiasts.
adjectives: innovative, functional, bold, active, novelty
visual_design_notes: Cans feature bold, athletic-themed branding with bright colors representing each flavor.
product_traits: 8% ABV, 11g protein, non-carbonated, three flavors, marketed to active lifestyles.
why_in_or_out: Included as the leading U.S. spiked protein drink brand, directly aligned with the 'functional protein drink' focus.

use_cases: Used for daily hydration, athletic performance, and vitamin/mineral supplementation.
adjectives: functional, non-carbonated, vitamin-enriched, low-calorie, refreshing
visual_design_notes: Minimalist, bold typography, clear PET bottles with colorful labels corresponding to flavors.
product_traits: Non-carbonated, low or zero sugar, enriched with vitamins and minerals, no protein content.
why_in_or_out: In: Core competitor in functional hydration but not in functional protein drinks.

use_cases: Daily beverage for gut health support, flavorful low-calorie alternative to traditional soda.
adjectives: flavorful, low-calorie, prebiotic, refreshing, natural, colorful, healthy

product_traits: 3-4g sugar, 20 calories per can, uses PreticX™ prebiotic, real fruit juice, organic cane sugar, and stevia.
why_in_or_out: In: Sets strong precedent for wellness-oriented prebiotic sodas focused on gut health and lifestyle.

product_traits: Non-alcoholic, sustainably sourced botanicals, three flavor profiles, crafted for mixing with tonic, nature-inspired.
why_in_or_out: In: Directly competes in non-alcoholic aperitif lane with an emphasis on sophistication and natural ingredients.

use_cases: Suitable for health-conscious consumers seeking a flavorful soda alternative that supports digestive health.

use_cases: Enjoyed as a flavorful, healthier soft drink alternative for those seeking digestive support and wellness.

use_cases: Casual gatherings, parties, outdoor events, and occasions where premium convenience is desired.

use_cases: Social gatherings, parties, or casual refreshment for adults avoiding alcohol or sugar.

why_in_or_out: Included for direct relevance to premium non-alcoholic mocktail competition with a strong presence in the Dutch and European markets.

why_in_or_out: In—well-known ginger ale in the Dutch and mixer markets, aligning with adult social drinking occasions.

use_cases: Ideal for social gatherings, parties, and convenient at-home cocktail experiences.
